growthexperiments-confirmemail-emailhelp: Iimayl ayaa loo baahan yahay si aad u soo ceshato akoonkaaga haddii aad lumiso furahaaga sirta ah.
growthexperiments-confirmemail-emailwarn: Fadlan ka raadi iimayl naga yimid si aad u xaqiijiso ciwaankaaga iimaylka.
growthexperiments-signupcampaign-title: Waad ku mahadsan tahay tabarucaaddaada! Hadda ku biir bulshada tafatirayaasha ee maanta ka dhigaya Wikipedia mid ka sii wanaagsan
growthexperiments-signupcampaign-body: Wax ka beddelka Wikipedia wuxuu noqon karaa mid fudud sida ku darista xiriiriye ama beddelidda hal eray. Waxaad heli doontaa soo-jeedinno ku saabsan maqaallada ku jira {{GENDER:|mawduucyada}} aad xiisaynayso ka dib marka aad samaysato akoonkaaga!
growthexperiments-signupcampaign-bullet1: Maqaallo la soo jeediyay oo ku saabsan {{GENDER:|danahaaga}}
growthexperiments-signupcampaign-bullet2: Caawimaad ka codso tafatire khibrad leh
growthexperiments-signupcampaign-bullet3: Ku billow wax ka beddello yaryar oo fudud
growthexperiments-campaigns-footer: Markaad boggan ku samaysato {{GENDER:|akoonkaaga}}, waxaa lala xiriirin doonaa ololahan ujeeddooyin la xiriira waayo aragnimada iyo falanqaynta.
